---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello! My name is Onur Can Gültekin.

I am an Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University.

This is my personal webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

```{=html}
<style>
#app{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;padding:1rem 0;font-family:var(--font-sans)}
#canvas{border-radius:var(--border-radius-lg);border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);display:block;margin:0 auto;cursor:pointer}
.section-title{font-size:13px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin:0 0 6px;font-weight:500;text-align:center}
.row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin:8px 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
.pill-btn{padding:5px 16px;border-radius:20px;border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary);background:var(--color-background-primary);color:var(--color-text-primary);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;font-weight:400}
.pill-btn.active{background:var(--sel,#e25822);color:#fff;border-color:transparent;font-weight:500}
.pill-btn:hover:not(.active){background:var(--color-background-secondary)}
#timing-bar-wrap{width:320px;height:12px;background:var(--color-background-secondary);border-radius:6px;margin:8px auto 0;border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);overflow:hidden}
#timing-bar{height:100%;width:0%;border-radius:6px;background:#e25822;transition:background .1s}
#msg{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;min-height:20px;margin:6px 0 0;color:var(--color-text-primary);text-align:center}
#shoot-btn{margin:8px auto 0;display:block;font-size:14px;padding:9px 40px;border-radius:var(--border-radius-lg);background:#e25822;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500}
#shoot-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.stat-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:28px;margin:8px 0 0}
.stat{text-align:center}
.stat-num{font-size:22px;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary)}
.stat-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--color-text-secondary)}
.divider{border:none;border-top:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);margin:16px 0}
#leaderboard{background:var(--color-background-primary);border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);border-radius:var(--border-radius-lg);padding:14px 16px}
#lb-list{margin:8px 0 0}
.lb-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);font-size:13px}
.lb-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.lb-rank{width:22px;text-align:center;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary)}
.lb-name{flex:1;color:var(--color-text-primary)}
.lb-diff{font-size:11px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);background:var(--color-background-secondary);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px}
.lb-score{font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary);min-width:36px;text-align:right}
#save-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px}
#save-row input{flex:1;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:var(--border-radius-md);border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary);background:var(--color-background-primary);color:var(--color-text-primary);font-size:13px}
#save-btn{padding:7px 18px;border-radius:var(--border-radius-md);background:#e25822;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;white-space:nowrap}
#save-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:default}
#lb-status{font-size:12px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin:4px 0 0;min-height:16px}
</style>

<div id="app">
  <p class="section-title">Ball color</p>
  <div class="row" id="color-btns">
    <button class="pill-btn active" data-color="#e25822" style="--sel:#e25822">Orange</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#e74c3c" style="--sel:#e74c3c">Red</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#f59e0b" style="--sel:#f59e0b">Yellow</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#3b82f6" style="--sel:#3b82f6">Blue</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#8b5cf6" style="--sel:#8b5cf6">Purple</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#ec4899" style="--sel:#ec4899">Pink</button>
  </div>
  <p class="section-title" style="margin-top:8px">Difficulty</p>
  <div class="row" id="diff-btns">
    <button class="pill-btn active" data-diff="Easy" data-speed="1.4" style="--sel:#27ae60">Easy</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-diff="Medium" data-speed="2.4" style="--sel:#f59e0b">Medium</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-diff="Hard" data-speed="3.8" style="--sel:#e74c3c">Hard</button>
  </div>

  <canvas id="canvas" width="420" height="320"></canvas>
  <div id="timing-bar-wrap"><div id="timing-bar"></div></div>
  <div id="msg">Press SHOOT to start!</div>
  <div class="stat-row">
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="score">0</div><div class="stat-lbl">Points</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="attempts">0</div><div class="stat-lbl">Attempts</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="pct">0%</div><div class="stat-lbl">Accuracy</div></div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center"><button id="shoot-btn">SHOOT</button></div>
  <hr class="divider">
  <div id="leaderboard">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
      <span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary)">Top 10 Leaderboard</span>
      <span id="lb-loading" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--color-text-secondary)">Loading...</span>
    </div>
    <div id="lb-list"></div>
    <div id="save-row">
      <input id="name-input" type="text" placeholder="Your name" maxlength="20">
      <button id="save-btn" disabled>Save score</button>
    </div>
    <div id="lb-status"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const canvas=document.getElementById('canvas'),ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
const W=canvas.width,H=canvas.height;
let ballColor='#e25822',timerSpeed=1.4,diffLabel='Easy';
let state='idle',timerVal=0,timerDir=1;
let ballX,ballY,ballVx,ballVy,spin=0,scored=false,animId=null;
let score=0,attempts=0,makes=0;
let cheerTimer=0;
let confetti=[];

const HOOP_X=330,HOOP_Y=108,HOOP_R=20;
const BX=100,BY=210;

const CROWD=[];
const crowdColors=['#e74c3c','#3b82f6','#f59e0b','#8b5cf6','#ec4899','#27ae60','#e25822','#64748b'];
for(let row=0;row<3;row++){
  for(let i=0;i<22;i++){
    CROWD.push({
      x:10+i*19,y:18+row*28,
      color:crowdColors[Math.floor(Math.random()*crowdColors.length)],
      phase:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,
      speed:0.04+Math.random()*0.03
    });
  }
}

function drawStands(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#1e293b';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H*0.42);
  for(let r=0;r<3;r++){
    ctx.fillStyle=r%2===0?'#263548':'#1e2d3e';
    ctx.fillRect(0,8+r*28,W,26);
  }
}
function drawCrowd(){
  CROWD.forEach(p=>{
    const bounce=cheerTimer>0?Math.sin(p.phase)*6:Math.sin(p.phase*0.3)*1.5;
    const armAngle=cheerTimer>0?-2.0+Math.sin(p.phase+Date.now()*0.005)*0.4:-0.3;
    const cy=p.y+bounce;
    ctx.fillStyle=p.color;ctx.fillRect(p.x-5,cy+10,10,12);
    ctx.fillStyle='#f4a261';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,cy+7,6,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle=p.color;ctx.lineWidth=2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(p.x-5,cy+13);ctx.lineTo(p.x-11,cy+13+Math.cos(armAngle)*8);
    ctx.moveTo(p.x+5,cy+13);ctx.lineTo(p.x+11,cy+13+Math.cos(armAngle)*8);
    ctx.stroke();
    p.phase+=p.speed;
  });
}
function drawFloor(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#c8842a';ctx.fillRect(0,H*0.42,W,H*(1-0.42));
  ctx.strokeStyle='#b5741f';ctx.lineWidth=0.8;
  for(let i=0;i<12;i++){
    const y=H*0.42+i*((H*(1-0.42))/12);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(W,y);ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,H*0.44);ctx.lineTo(W,H*0.44);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(W*0.15,H*0.44,60,0,Math.PI*0.6);
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.stroke();
}
function drawBackboard(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#888';ctx.fillRect(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+6,HOOP_Y-32,5,H-HOOP_Y);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,230,255,0.85)';ctx.fillRect(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+3,HOOP_Y-34,14,58);
  ctx.strokeStyle='#e74c3c';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.strokeRect(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+5,HOOP_Y-20,10,28);
  ctx.strokeStyle='#e74c3c';ctx.lineWidth=3;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R,HOOP_Y);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+3,HOOP_Y);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';ctx.lineWidth=1;
  for(let i=0;i<5;i++){
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R+i*(HOOP_R*2/4),HOOP_Y);
    ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R/2+i*(HOOP_R/2),HOOP_Y+22);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R,HOOP_Y+8);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X+HOOP_R,HOOP_Y+8);
  ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R+2,HOOP_Y+16);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X+HOOP_R-2,HOOP_Y+16);
  ctx.stroke();
}
function drawPlayer(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#f4a261';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(BX,BY-50,13,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle=ballColor;ctx.fillRect(BX-11,BY-37,22,28);
  ctx.fillStyle='#1e293b';ctx.fillRect(BX-10,BY-9,20,16);
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX-11,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX-17,BY+14);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX+11,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX+24,BY-24);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX-4,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX-9,BY+30);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX+4,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX+9,BY+30);ctx.stroke();
}
function drawBall(x,y,s){
  ctx.save();ctx.translate(x,y);ctx.rotate(s||0);
  ctx.fillStyle=ballColor;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(0,0,12,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.35)';ctx.lineWidth=1.3;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(-12,0);ctx.lineTo(12,0);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(0,0,12,0,Math.PI);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(0,0,12,Math.PI,0);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.restore();
}
function spawnConfetti(){
  for(let i=0;i<40;i++){
    confetti.push({
      x:HOOP_X+Math.random()*40-20,y:HOOP_Y,
      vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*4,vy:-Math.random()*5-2,
      color:['#f59e0b','#e74c3c','#3b82f6','#ec4899','#27ae60','#fff'][Math.floor(Math.random()*6)],
      life:1,w:5+Math.random()*5,h:4+Math.random()*3
    });
  }
}
function updateConfetti(){
  confetti=confetti.filter(c=>c.life>0);
  confetti.forEach(c=>{
    c.x+=c.vx;c.y+=c.vy;c.vy+=0.15;c.life-=0.025;
    ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=c.life;ctx.fillStyle=c.color;
    ctx.fillRect(c.x,c.y,c.w,c.h);ctx.restore();
  });
}
function redrawStatic(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  drawStands();drawCrowd();drawFloor();drawBackboard();drawPlayer();
  drawBall(BX+18,BY-32,0);
}
function updateBar(){
  const bar=document.getElementById('timing-bar');
  bar.style.width=timerVal+'%';
  bar.style.background=(timerVal>38&&timerVal<62)?'#27ae60':ballColor;
}
function updateStats(){
  document.getElementById('score').textContent=score;
  document.getElementById('attempts').textContent=attempts;
  document.getElementById('pct').textContent=attempts?Math.round(makes/attempts*100)+'%':'0%';
  document.getElementById('save-btn').disabled=score===0;
}
function setMsg(t,c){const m=document.getElementById('msg');m.textContent=t;m.style.color=c||'var(--color-text-primary)';}

function animate(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  drawStands();
  if(cheerTimer>0)cheerTimer--;
  drawCrowd();drawFloor();drawBackboard();drawPlayer();
  updateConfetti();
  if(state==='timing'){
    timerVal+=timerDir*timerSpeed;
    if(timerVal>=100||timerVal<=0)timerDir*=-1;
    updateBar();drawBall(BX+18,BY-32,0);
  }
  if(state==='flying'){
    ballX+=ballVx;ballY+=ballVy;ballVy+=0.3;spin+=0.13;
    drawBall(ballX,ballY,spin);
    const dx=ballX-HOOP_X,dy=ballY-HOOP_Y;
    if(!scored&&Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)<HOOP_R+3){
      scored=true;makes++;score+=2;attempts++;updateStats();
      setMsg('BASKET! +2','#27ae60');cheerTimer=90;spawnConfetti();
      state='done';setTimeout(reset,1600);return;
    }
    if(ballY>H+20){
      if(!scored){attempts++;updateStats();setMsg('Miss! Try again.','#e74c3c');state='done';setTimeout(reset,1200);return;}
    }
  }
  if(state!=='done')animId=requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  else{ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);drawStands();drawCrowd();drawFloor();drawBackboard();drawPlayer();}
}
function reset(){
  state='idle';timerVal=0;timerDir=1;scored=false;
  document.getElementById('timing-bar').style.width='0%';
  setMsg('Press SHOOT to start!');
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='SHOOT';
  cancelAnimationFrame(animId);redrawStatic();
}

document.getElementById('shoot-btn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  if(state==='idle'){state='timing';document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='RELEASE!';setMsg('Release at the green zone!');animate();}
  else if(state==='timing'){
    const green=timerVal>38&&timerVal<62;
    const off=green?0:(timerVal<38?(timerVal-38)/38:(timerVal-62)/38);
    ballX=BX+18;ballY=BY-32;ballVx=4.4;ballVy=Math.tan(-1.08+off*0.55)*ballVx;
    state='flying';scored=false;document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='...';
  }
});

document.querySelectorAll('#color-btns .pill-btn').forEach(b=>{
  b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('#color-btns .pill-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    b.classList.add('active');ballColor=b.dataset.color;
    document.getElementById('shoot-btn').style.background=b.dataset.color;
    redrawStatic();
  });
});
document.querySelectorAll('#diff-btns .pill-btn').forEach(b=>{
  b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('#diff-btns .pill-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    b.classList.add('active');timerSpeed=parseFloat(b.dataset.speed);diffLabel=b.dataset.diff;
  });
});

redrawStatic();
setInterval(()=>{if(state==='idle')redrawStatic();},50);

const LB_KEY='basketball_arena_v2';
async function loadLB(){try{const r=await window.storage.get(LB_KEY,true);return r?JSON.parse(r.value):[]}catch(e){return[]}}
async function saveLB(d){try{await window.storage.set(LB_KEY,JSON.stringify(d),true)}catch(e){}}
function renderLB(data){
  document.getElementById('lb-loading').textContent='';
  const el=document.getElementById('lb-list');
  if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);padding:8px 0">No scores yet. Be the first!</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML=data.slice(0,10).map((r,i)=>`
    <div class="lb-row">
      <span class="lb-rank">${i===0?'🥇':i===1?'🥈':i===2?'🥉':i+1}</span>
      <span class="lb-name">${r.name}</span>
      <span class="lb-diff">${r.diff}</span>
      <span class="lb-score">${r.score} pts</span>
    </div>`).join('');
}
loadLB().then(renderLB);

document.getElementById('save-btn').addEventListener('click',async()=>{
  const name=document.getElementById('name-input').value.trim();
  if(!name){document.getElementById('lb-status').textContent='Please enter your name.';return;}
  if(score===0){document.getElementById('lb-status').textContent='Score at least 2 points first!';return;}
  document.getElementById('save-btn').disabled=true;
  document.getElementById('lb-status').textContent='Saving...';
  const data=await loadLB();
  data.push({name,score,diff:diffLabel,ts:Date.now()});
  data.sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);
  const top=data.slice(0,10);
  await saveLB(top);renderLB(top);
  document.getElementById('lb-status').textContent='Saved! Good game.';
  document.getElementById('name-input').value='';
});
</script>
```
